untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) major breakout identification, (2) congestion area formation and boundaries, (3) 10-day waiting period confirmation, and (4) logical stops at congestion extremes. These require pattern recognition and state tracking not expressible through simple indicator comparisons. Congestion area top/bottom boundaries and breakout context cannot be mechanically defined with available indicators. Bollinger Bands used as proxy for congestion but does not capture the full semantic intent.
translation_notes: This is a pattern-based signal requiring multi-bar analysis and contextual state (prior breakout detection, congestion formation timing). The allowed indicators cannot identify 'major breakouts' or dynamically track congestion area boundaries. A full implementation would require custom pattern detection logic outside the scope of indicator-based rules. Bollinger Bands were substituted as a weak proxy for range-bound congestion, but this does not faithfully represent the intended logic.
